prompt: Invite jane@acme.com to our UiPath organization and add her to the Administrators group

uip admin users invite --email new.hire@acme.com --output json
Delete the user mark.old@acme.com from our organization directory

uip admin groups members add 1a2b3c4d --user-ids 9f8e7d6c

uip admin robot-accounts create --name svc-finance-bot --output json

Offboard a departing employee: remove them from every group, then delete their identity user

uip admin authorization roles create --scope Tenant --name "ReadOnlyOps" --file ./actions.json

roles assignments create failed because the role's owner service doesn't match the scope path
Show me the permission definitions catalog across all services

uip admin tenants create --name staging --region europe --output json

tenants services remove reported Success but the service is still listed on the tenant
Add IP range 10.8.0.0/16 to the organization's IP allowlist

uip admin ip-restriction enforcement enable --confirm
Add a bypass rule so webhook callbacks are exempt from IP restriction

Export the org audit log for Q1 as a ZIP for the compliance team
uip admin audit export --from-date 2026-01-01 --to-date 2026-03-31 --output-file q1-audit.zip
